About Me

I Build Websites That Are Meant To Convert, Not Just Look Pretty

Be honest with yourself for a second.

You work hard every single day. You give your customers great service, you've built real trust over the years, and you've put in effort that most people never see. But somewhere, quietly, you're still losing clients. Not because your service is bad. Not because you're not good at what you do. But because the moment someone searches for you online, they don't find you, or worse, they find something that doesn't reflect how good you actually are.

That's the real problem. It was never your business. It's your online presence.

I'm Md Ibrar: A WordPress Developer & Web Designer. I build high-converting websites for local businesses and service providers who deserve to be seen the way they actually deserve to be seen. Not invisible. Not outdated. Not losing to a competitor who simply has a better website, and honestly, maybe a weaker business than yours.

If your website has been sitting there for months without a single call or enquiry coming in, that's not your fault. Nobody taught you what makes a website actually work. And if you don't have a website at all yet, ask yourself this: how many people searched for what you do today, and chose someone else simply because they showed up first?

This is exactly why I do things differently.

What makes my approach different
→ Demo Before You Pay: I build you a fully working demo of your website first. Completely free. No cost, no pressure, no commitment. You see it, you use it, you feel it in your gut, and only then do we talk about moving forward.
→ Built to Convert: Every section, every button, every word is placed with one goal. Turning visitors into paying clients.
→ No Templates, No Shortcuts: Fully custom WordPress and Elementor builds. Fast, mobile-ready, and built to rank on Google.
→ Quick Delivery: No long waiting. Most websites are live and ready within days, because every day without the right website is a day you're quietly losing business you deserve.
Here's what this means for your business
❖ A website designed to rank on Google and Google Maps, so people searching for exactly what you offer, actually find you first
❖ A site that builds instant trust the moment someone visits it, so they reach out instead of scrolling past
❖ Pages built purely to turn visitors into real inquiries, not just polite compliments on how it looks
❖ A portfolio you can proudly share on WhatsApp, on social media, with every new customer who asks "do you have a website?"
❖ A redesign that turns your outdated, slow site into something modern, fast, and built to convert

I've worked with business owners across India and abroad, and every single one of them felt exactly what you might be feeling right now before we started: doubt, hesitation, "will this actually help my business?" And every single one of them, after seeing their free demo, felt something shift.

So here's my honest question to you. How much longer are you willing to let a weak online presence quietly cost you customers you've already earned?

You don't have to decide today. But you do deserve to at least see what's possible.

Why Choose Me

What Makes Working With Me Different

Free Demo Before You Pay

You see a fully working website before you commit a single rupee. No guesswork, no leap of faith - just proof.

Fully Custom Builds

No cheap recycled templates. Every site is designed around your business, not a theme demo.

Fast Turnaround

Quick delivery without cutting corners, so you're live and taking enquiries sooner.

Ongoing Support

Post-delivery support included, so you're never left stuck after launch.

Built To Convert

Every layout and CTA is placed with one goal - turning visitors into enquiries and clients.

India & Abroad

Clients served across India and internationally, across hospitality, real estate, and local services.

How I Work

From First Message To Website Launch

01

Enquiry

You reach out via WhatsApp, call, or the contact form with your project requirement.

02

Consultation

We understand your business goals, audience, and pick the right package together.

03

Free Demo Build

A fully working demo website is built and shared - before any payment is made.

Standout Step
04

Development & Delivery

After approval, the full site is built, tested, and delivered live with ongoing support.

FAQ

Common Questions

How does the "Free Demo Before You Pay" work?

I build a fully working demo website for your business first and share it with you. You get to see exactly what you're getting - design, layout, and content - before you pay a single rupee or dollar. Only once you approve the demo do we move forward with payment and full development.

What if I don't like the demo?

No problem at all - since no payment is made before the demo, there's zero risk on your side. We can either revise the direction or you're free to walk away.

How long does delivery take?

Most landing pages are delivered in 3 days, and multi-page websites in around 4 days after demo approval. Larger custom builds may take longer depending on scope.

Do you provide hosting and domain setup?

Yes, hosting setup is included in select packages, and I can guide you through domain setup as well.

What platforms do you build on?

I specialize in WordPress with Elementor, along with WooCommerce for stores that need eCommerce functionality.

Do you offer post-launch support?

Yes, ongoing support is included after delivery so you're never left stuck if something needs adjusting.

Can I request revisions?

Yes, each package includes a set number of revisions, and custom builds come with unlimited revisions within the agreed scope.

How do payments work?

Payment is only made after you've seen and approved the free demo - never before.
